stemHtml: When voice communications are used to correct CPDLC clearances, instructions, information or requests, what is the phraseology that should be used?

options.a: "Correct CPDLC follows", followed by the correct message
options.b: "Disregard CPDLC MESSAGE", followed by correct message
options.c: "Negative CPDLC MESSAGE", followed by correct message
options.d: "Incorrect CPDLC MESSAGE", followed by correct message
